query: SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_price FROM listings GROUP BY platform;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LLnN1XkN7uwWVPt.root --database KomMtGDchgkpshr4gKWbJK --execute SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_price FROM listings GROUP BY platform;
